title: gh#71: R3.6 â€” Sweep: narrow encryption exports; mark ADR-0002 superseded
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/71.
Backlog section: Candidate 3 â€” TokenVault.

## Context

Final PR in Candidate 3. After R3.1â€“R3.5 ship, no caller outside the vault should be importing `encrypt`/`decrypt` directly. This PR confirms that and tightens the boundary.

## Scope

- Verify nothing outside `packages/shared/src/tokens/` and `packages/shared/src/__tests__/` imports `encrypt` or `decrypt`:
  ```
  rg "from '@sms/shared/encryption'|from '@sms/shared'.*\\b(encrypt|decrypt)\\b" packages
  ```
- Narrow `packages/shared/src/index.ts`:
  - Stop re-exporting `encrypt` / `decrypt` as top-level. Keep them importable via the subpath `@sms/shared/encryption` for the vault's internal use.
  - Keep `validateEncryptionKey` re-exported (used by `main()` to construct the vault).
- Update ADR-0002 header to reflect supersession:
  - Add `**Status:** Superseded by ADR-0005 (Candidate 3 shipped).` near the top
  - Existing body unchanged (the historical context is still accurate)
- Write ADR-0005 documenting the TokenVault decision (Î˛ + Path A) â€” see grilling notes for the rationale to capture
- Update `CONTEXT.md` to add `TokenVault`, `Credentials`, `SafeProfile` as domain terms

## Out of scope

- Any behavior changes â€” verify with full test suite
- Removing the underlying `encryption.ts` module (kept; it's what the vault is built on)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/api build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/worker build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- `rg "decrypt\(|encrypt\(" packages/api/src packages/worker/src --type ts` returns matches only inside the vault module
- `docs/adr/0002-...` shows superseded status
- `docs/adr/0005-tokenvault...` exists

## References

- Closes the TokenVault candidate; supersedes ADR-0002
- Depends on: #67, #68, #69, #70
